services in an observation unit 
N = No observation unit services. 

COMMENT: If any claim that comprises the Stay has a revenue center code (REV-CNTR-CD) equal to '0762' then 
MEDPAR Observation Switch = 'Y'. If no '0762' revenue center code, then field ='N'. 

This field is new in 2011.
